title: What kind of outfits would Rei wear
display_title: What kind of outfits would Rei wear
wikitext:
[]: What kind of outfits would Rei wear?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sun May 02, 2021 2:48 pm Ok, so say that Rei was given a more distinct personality, like a kind of bubbly and cheerful disposition as shown in EOTV, I’ve been kind of wondering what sort of outfits she would wear to match her personality. Would she wear something fancy or casual? Or something that would fit today’s trend? I’ve seen many fan arts, though I’m interested in what be considered close to canon.

[]: Re: What kind of outfits would Rei wear?             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Sun May 02, 2021 4:57 pm I'd look at the official fashion art for the Evangelion clothes lines as they have lines just for Rei. Though if this is for fanfiction writing I'd say write what ever you want. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: What kind of outfits would Rei wear?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun May 02, 2021 5:54 pm C.T.1290 wrote: a more distinct personality,

[]: Re: What kind of outfits would Rei wear?             Quote Post by caser713 » Sat May 22, 2021 5:36 pm this is just my opinion, but i think that if someone let her choose what she wanted to wear (like if Misato took her shopping) she would pick out neutral colored, frilly clothes :} maybe also things like white button-ups and plaid skirts, since they'd fit in with the uniformity she's had all her life. like this! sorry the image is massive lol SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: What kind of outfits would Rei wear?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sat May 22, 2021 8:12 pm caser713 wrote: this is just my opinion, but i think that if someone let her choose what she wanted to wear (like if Misato took her shopping) she would pick out neutral colored, frilly clothes :} maybe also things like white button-ups and plaid skirts, since they'd fit in with the uniformity she's had all her life. like this! sorry the image is massive lol SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: What kind of outfits would Rei wear?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun May 23, 2021 9:26 am ^^ id agree with both of the last two suggestions

[]: Re: What kind of outfits would Rei wear?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Mon May 24, 2021 10:44 pm This might sound a little weird, but could anyone actually imagine her in some sort of goth girl outfit or something on the punk or rebellious side? Not that she actually is one.

[]: Re: What kind of outfits would Rei wear?             Quote Post by caser713 » Mon May 24, 2021 10:52 pm I think it would look really cute on her! Personally I think lolita-goth would suit her best, but really any style would work on her. Plus it might be fun to have her style contradict her personality if you wanted to give her a more bubbly one

[]: Re: What kind of outfits would Rei wear?             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Tue May 25, 2021 6:13 am C.T.1290 wrote: This might sound a little weird, but could anyone actually imagine her in some sort of goth girl outfit [...]

[]: Re: What kind of outfits would Rei wear?             Quote Post by Berserker » Tue May 25, 2021 11:13 am It took me a moment to realize that her hands are just behind her back, not absolutely non-existent...
